---
title: Global Mortality
author: Phil Roberts
date: '2018-04-16'
slug: global-mortality
categories:
  - Tidy Tuesday
tags:
  - Health
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE)
library(tidytuesdayR)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr, warn.conflicts = FALSE)
library(here)
library(skimr)
library(kableExtra)
```

#Global Mortality
 get data from github tt repo
```{r}
raw <- tt_load("2018-04-16")
```
